title: rubus dendrocharis
intro: Rubus dendrocharis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of shrub native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and providing relief from fever and pain. Rubus dendrocharis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is also used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
